audit_items.proof_trace: Both conditions are enforced on the sole execution path: lines 131-134 revert if `s_auctionStarts[token] == 0`, and lines 148-152 revert if `elapsedTime > assetParams.auctionDuration`. `s_auctionStarts` is set to `block.timestamp` on auction start (BaseAuction.sol:353) and deleted on end (BaseAuction.sol:367), with no bypass paths around either guard.
